glosses.en: go back down; come back down
glosses.es: volver a bajar; bajar de nuevo
glosses.nl: weer naar beneden gaan; opnieuw afdalen
glosses.nb: gå ned igjen; gå ned på nytt
glosses.sv: gå ner igen; gå ned på nytt
glosses.ro: a coborî din nou; a merge din nou în jos
glosses.da: gå ned igen; gå ned på ny
glosses.ja: 再び降りる; もう一度降りる

sentences.target: Tu redescends les cartons du grenier.

translations.fr: Tu redescends les cartons du grenier.
translations.en: You’re taking the boxes down from the attic.
translations.de: Du trägst die Kartons vom Dachboden herunter.
translations.it: Porti giù le scatole dalla soffitta.
translations.zh-Hans: 你正在把箱子从阁楼搬下来。
translations.yue: 你正喺閣樓度將啲箱搬落嚟。
translations.pt: Você está descendo as caixas do sótão.
translations.he: אתה מוריד את הקופסאות מהעליית הגג.
translations.vi: Bạn đang mang các thùng từ gác mái xuống.
translations.nl: Je brengt de dozen van de zolder naar beneden.
translations.hi: तुम अटारी से डिब्बे नीचे उतार रहे हो.
translations.el: Κατεβάζεις τα κουτιά από τη σοφίτα.
translations.nb: Du tar kassene ned fra loftet.
translations.sv: Du bär ner lådorna från vinden.
translations.da: Du bærer kasserne ned fra loftet.
translations.ja: 屋根裏から箱を降ろしている。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular; syntactic subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative 2nd person singular; transitive here, meaning to bring/take down again.
Definite article, plural; introduces the direct object noun phrase.
Common noun, plural; direct object of the verb.
Contraction of preposition ‘de’ + definite article ‘le’; marks source/origin of the movement.
Common noun; complement of the preposition ‘du’ indicating the source location.

translations.en: We’re going down by the stairs.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đi xuống bằng cầu thang.
translations.nl: We gaan naar beneden via de trap.
translations.hi: हम सीढ़ियों से नीचे जा रहे हैं.

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/generic subject pronoun (often colloquial ‘we’); governs 3rd person singular verb.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; intransitive use here.
Preposition indicating route or means.
Definite article, plural; introduces the object of the preposition.
Common noun, plural; object of the preposition ‘par’ specifying the path.

sentences.target: Je dois redescendre chercher mon manteau.

translations.fr: Je dois redescendre chercher mon manteau.
translations.en: I need to go back down to get my coat.
translations.es: Tengo que bajar a buscar mi abrigo.
translations.de: Ich muss wieder runtergehen, um meinen Mantel zu holen.
translations.it: Devo scendere di nuovo a prendere il mio cappotto.
translations.zh-Hans: 我得再下去拿我的外套。
translations.yue: 我要再落去攞我件外套。
translations.ru: Мне нужно снова спуститься, чтобы забрать своё пальто.
translations.pt: Preciso descer de novo para pegar meu casaco.
translations.he: אני צריך לרדת שוב כדי לקחת את המעיל שלי.
translations.tr: Montumu almak için tekrar aşağı inmem gerekiyor.
translations.vi: Tôi cần xuống lại để lấy áo khoác của mình.
translations.ar: يجب أن أنزل مرة أخرى لأخذ معطفي.
translations.nl: Ik moet weer naar beneden om mijn jas te halen.
translations.uk: Мені треба знову спуститися, щоб забрати своє пальто.
translations.hu: Le kell mennem megint, hogy elhozzam a kabátomat.
translations.hi: मुझे अपना कोट लेने के लिए फिर नीचे जाना है.
translations.pl: Muszę znowu zejść po mój płaszcz.
translations.el: Πρέπει να ξανακατέβω για να πάρω το παλτό μου.
translations.nb: Jeg må ned igjen for å hente jakken min.
translations.id: Aku harus turun lagi untuk mengambil jaketku.
translations.sv: Jag måste gå ner igen för att hämta min jacka.
translations.ro: Trebuie să cobor din nou ca să-mi iau paltonul.
translations.cs: Musím znovu sejít dolů pro svůj kabát.
translations.da: Jeg skal ned igen for at hente min jakke.
translations.fi: Minun täytyy mennä taas alas hakemaan takkini.
translations.ja: コートを取りにもう一度下に降りる必要がある。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular; subject of ‘dois’.
Finite verb, present indicative 1st person singular; modal-like verb expressing obligation and taking an infinitival complement.
Infinitive verb; xcomp (non-finite complement) of ‘dois’ indicating the action required.
Infinitive verb; bare infinitive expressing purpose following a verb of movement (‘redescendre’).
Possessive determiner, 1st person singular; agrees in gender/number with ‘manteau’ and introduces the noun.
Common noun; direct object of the infinitive ‘chercher’.

sentences.target: Nous redescendons les valises au rez-de-chaussée.
sentences.reading: /nu ʁədɛsɑ̃dɔ̃ le valiz o ʁe də ʃose/

translations.fr: Nous redescendons les valises au rez-de-chaussée.
translations.ipa: /nu ʁədɛsɑ̃dɔ̃ le valiz o ʁe də ʃose/
translations.en: We’re taking the suitcases back down to the ground floor.
translations.es: Bajamos las maletas a la planta baja.
translations.de: Wir tragen die Koffer ins Erdgeschoss hinunter.
translations.it: Portiamo giù le valigie al piano terra.
translations.ko: 우리는 여행가방을 들고 1층으로 다시 내려가고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们把行李箱搬回一楼。
translations.yue: 我哋將行李喼搬返落地下。
translations.ru: Мы снова спускаем чемоданы на первый этаж.
translations.pt: Estamos levando as malas de volta para o térreo.
translations.he: אנחנו מורידים את המזוודות לקומת הקרקע.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang mang va-li xuống lại tầng trệt.
translations.ar: نحن نُنزل الحقائب إلى الطابق الأرضي مرة أخرى.
translations.nl: We brengen de koffers weer naar de begane grond.
translations.uk: Ми знову спускаємо валізи на перший поверх.
translations.hi: हम सूटकेसों को वापस भूतल पर नीचे ले जा रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Znosimy walizki z powrotem na parter.
translations.el: Κατεβάζουμε ξανά τις βαλίτσες στο ισόγειο.
translations.nb: Vi bærer koffertene ned igjen til første etasje.
translations.id: Kami menurunkan koper-koper kembali ke lantai dasar.
translations.sv: Vi bär ner resväskorna till bottenvåningen igen.
translations.ro: Coborâm din nou valizele la parter.
translations.da: Vi bærer kufferterne ned igen til stueetagen.
translations.ja: スーツケースを一階にもう一度下ろしています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person plural; subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative 1st person plural; transitive here with a direct object.
Definite article, plural; introduces the direct object noun phrase.
Common noun, plural; direct object of the verb.
Contraction of preposition ‘à’ + definite article ‘le’; introduces the destination/location complement.
Lexicalized compound noun; complement of the preposition ‘au’ indicating the destination.
